components.content: Validation queue for assets captured provisionally in the field — confirm, merge or reject before they enter the register

formSettings.onAfterDataLoad: var run=async function(){ try { var r=await http.get('/api/services/AssetManagement/ProvisionalAsset/Summary'); var s=(r&&r.data&&r.data.result)||{}; form.setFormData({ values:{ kpiPending:s.pending, kpiConfirmed:s.confirmed, kpiMerged:s.merged, kpiRejected:s.rejected }, mergeValues:true }); } catch(e){} }; return run();
